nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Anabathmis
nodes.summary: Anabathmis（Anabathmis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联3种鸟类，如Reichenbach's sunbird、Príncipe sunbird、Newton's sunbird。

nodes.name: Newton's sunbird
nodes.summary: Newton's sunbird（Anabathmis newtonii）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Newton's sunbird。

nodes.name: Newton's sunbird
nodes.summary: Newton's sunbird, or the São Tomé sunbird (Anabathmis newtonii) is a species of bird in the family Nectariniidae. It is endemic to São Tomé Island. It is one of the smallest sunbirds. In general, the bird has dark olive upperparts - the male has an iridescent green-purple throat and upper breast region, while females have a dull olive throat and yellowish underparts, but underparts in female youth do not develop into yellow until later sexual maturity. References External links Data related to Anabathmis newtonii at Wikispecies Media related to Anabathmis newtonii at Wikimedia Commons
